title: Tapping to Claim a New Wealthy Family Story
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the inherited money story and claiming a new family line of abundance
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 77 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the money story inherited from family, and moves toward a clear, proud claim of the new story: one where each generation inherits comfort, choice, and ease.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 77 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the old family money story is louder than the new one, or when you are ready to mark the point where the lineage changes.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 77 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the money story carried from family history and moves toward a clear, proud claim of the new story: one that is already in motion and will be what the next generation inherits.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though my family once lived with struggle, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though that story shaped me, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I carried it for years, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: Our family story is transforming now.
Side of eye: From stress and limits to ease and overflow.
Under eye: I feel proud of this change.
Under nose: I bless the past and all it taught.
Chin: I see new patterns forming.
Collarbone: I love knowing my children inherit freedom.
Under arm: I feel deep gratitude for this shift.
Top of head: I fully claim our new wealthy family story.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: Our family is now defined by abundance.
Side of eye: We live in comfort and generosity.
Under eye: Each generation builds on lasting wealth.
Under nose: Love and prosperity flow side by side.
Chin: I'm proud to stand at this turning point.
Collarbone: I pass down confidence and opportunity.
Under arm: I celebrate the future we've secured.
Top of head: I claim a family legacy of joy and plenty.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 77 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
